title: App Store to Launch Over a Million New Apps This Year, Breaking Records; AI Coding Tools Trigger a Tsunami of Poor Quality Applications
excerpt: According to the latest report by data analysis firm Sensor Tower, the number of new apps added to the Apple App Store in just the first half of this year reach
content_html:
According to the latest report by data analysis firm Sensor Tower, the number of new apps added to the Apple App Store in just the first half of this year reached approximately 560,000. If this growth trend continues, the total number of new apps in 2026 is expected to exceed 1 million, far surpassing the historical high of 890,000 set in 2016.

However, the driving force behind this app boom is no longer professional developers, but ordinary people using AI coding tools.

AI programming lowers the barrier, leading to an overflow of low-quality applications

More people without programming experience are using AI coding tools such as Replit and Bolt.new, quickly generating full-stack applications with just natural language prompts. Professional developers also widely use smart assistants like Claude Code and GitHub Copilot to assist in development.

This has led to thousands of low-quality, homogenized "AI garbage apps" flooding the market. In sharp contrast to the explosive growth on the supply side, user download interest remains very low - overall app downloads on the App Store only grew by 3% last year, and the growth rate has further slowed to 2% so far this year.

Review pressure increases, imitations and security risks emerge

The massive number of app submissions has sparked debates about review efficiency. Many developers have complained on the Apple Developer Forum that the review cycle has significantly lengthened in recent months. Apple officially denied this claim and stated that 90% of apps can still be reviewed within 48 hours. Phillip Shoemaker, who managed the App Store from 2009 to 2016, warned that uncontrolled app surges not only severely consume Apple's review resources, but could also be exploited by malicious actors to sneak dangerous malware into the app store.

Many users have reported that the market is filled with counterfeit products with rough appearances and functions. Recent media reports have also pointed out that many AI-generated apps have serious privacy leakage risks, and some cannot even function properly as advertised.

blocks.html_en: The massive number of app submissions has sparked debates about review efficiency. Apple officially denied this claim and stated that 90% of apps can still be reviewed within 48 hours. sentences.zh: 大量的应用提交引发了关于审核效率的争论。

sentences.zh: 许多开发者在苹果开发者论坛上抱怨说，近几个月来审核周期明显延长。

sentences.en: Apple officially denied this claim and stated that 90% of apps can still be reviewed within 48 hours.
sentences.zh: 苹果官方否认了这一说法，并表示90%的应用程序仍然可以在48小时内审核。

sentences.en: Phillip Shoemaker, who managed the App Store from 2009 to 2016, warned that uncontrolled app surges not only severely consume Apple's review resources, but could also be exploited by malicious actors to sneak dangerous malware into the app store.
sentences.zh: 2009 年至 2016 年管理 App Store 的 Phillip Shoemaker 警告说，不受控制的应用程序激增不仅严重消耗了苹果的审核资源，而且还可能被恶意行为者利用，将危险的恶意软件偷偷带入应用程序商店。

blocks.html_en: Many users have reported that the market is filled with counterfeit products with rough appearances and functions. Recent media reports have also pointed out that many AI-generated apps have serious privacy leakage risks, and some cannot even function properly as advertised.

sentences.zh: 许多用户反映，市场上充斥着外观和功能粗糙的假冒产品。

sentences.en: Recent media reports have also pointed out that many AI-generated apps have serious privacy leakage risks, and some cannot even function properly as advertised.
sentences.zh: 近期媒体报道也指出，许多人工智能生成的应用程序存在严重的隐私泄露风险，有些甚至无法像宣传的那样正常运行。

content_html_zh:
根据数据分析公司Sensor Tower的最新报告，今年上半年苹果应用商店新增应用程序数量达到约56万个。 如果这种增长趋势持续下去，2026年新增应用总数预计将超过100万款，远超2016年创下的89万款历史新高。

然而，这股应用热潮背后的推动力不再是专业开发者，而是使用人工智能编码工具的普通人。

AI编程降低门槛，导致低质量应用泛滥

越来越多没有编程经验的人正在使用 Replit 和 Bolt.new 等 AI 编码工具，只需自然语言提示即可快速生成全栈应用程序。 专业开发者也广泛使用Claude Code、GitHub Copilot等智能助手来辅助开发。

这导致了数千个低质量、同质化的“AI垃圾应用”充斥市场。 与供给端的爆发式增长形成鲜明对比的是，用户下载兴趣依然很低——去年App Store的整体应用下载量仅增长了3%，今年迄今增速进一步放缓至2%。

审核压力加大，仿冒和安全风险凸显

大量的应用提交引发了关于审核效率的争论。 许多开发者在苹果开发者论坛上抱怨说，近几个月来审核周期明显延长。 苹果官方否认了这一说法，并表示90%的应用程序仍然可以在48小时内审核。 2009 年至 2016 年管理 App Store 的 Phillip Shoemaker 警告说，不受控制的应用程序激增不仅严重消耗了苹果的审核资源，而且还可能被恶意行为者利用，将危险的恶意软件偷偷带入应用程序商店。

许多用户反映，市场上充斥着外观和功能粗糙的假冒产品。 近期媒体报道也指出，许多人工智能生成的应用程序存在严重的隐私泄露风险，有些甚至无法像宣传的那样正常运行。
